    C

    chart - package chart
     
    ChartBar - Class in chart
    Modern Bar Chart with enhanced styling and visual hierarchy Features: Modern colors, improved axis labels, better legend formatting
    ChartBar() - Constructor for class chart.ChartBar
     
    ChartFrame - Class in chart
    Modern ChartFrame with enhanced UI styling Features: Modern color scheme, typography, spacing, and interactivity
    ChartFrame(JFreeChart) - Constructor for class chart.ChartFrame
     
    ChartLine - Class in chart
    Modern Line Chart with enhanced styling and trend visualization Features: Modern colors, smooth lines, improved readability
    ChartLine() - Constructor for class chart.ChartLine
     
    ChartPie - Class in chart
    Modern Pie Chart with enhanced styling and better visual hierarchy Features: Modern colors, improved labels, better legend placement
    ChartPie() - Constructor for class chart.ChartPie
     
    com.ex.calculate - package com.ex.calculate
     
    createCategoryBarChart(Map<String, Double>, String, String, String) - Static method in class chart.ChartBar
    Create category bar chart showing expense breakdown
    createCategoryTrendChart(Map<Integer, Double>, int, String) - Static method in class chart.ChartLine
    Create line chart showing category-specific trends

    Create month-to-month comparison bar chart

    Create monthly pie chart showing expense distribution by category
    createMonthlyTrendChart(Map<Integer, Double>, int) - Static method in class chart.ChartLine
    Create line chart showing monthly expense trends
    createYearlyBarChart(Map<Integer, Double>) - Static method in class chart.ChartBar
    Create yearly bar chart showing yearly trends
    createYearlyPieChart(Map<String, Double>, int) - Static method in class chart.ChartPie
    Create yearly pie chart showing expense distribution by category
    createYearlyTrendChart(Map<Integer, Double>) - Static method in class chart.ChartLine
